children.heading: Proprietary rights
children.label: a Proprietary rights
children.text: No trade secrets or commercial or financial information that is privileged or confidential, under the meaning of , which is obtained from a company as a result of activities under this chapter shall be disclosed.section 552(b)(4) of title 5
results from research and development activities conducted under this chapter; and

children.heading: Patent rights
children.label: c Patent rights
children.text: With respect to patent rights, the Institutes shall be treated in the same manner as are nonprofit organizations and small business firms under chapter 18 of title 35, notwithstanding any provisions to the contrary contained in that chapter.
